title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Doubtnut - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Doubtnut - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Doubtnut invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Doubtnut:
Doubtnut is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut!
